title: cuphea decandra
intro: Cuphea decandra, also known as the Butterfly Bush or Mexican Heather, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, recognized by its delicate pink or white blooms. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cuphea decandra include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as wounds, eczema, and acne, as well as its use as a natural remedy for respiratory issues, like coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Cuphea decandra include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to soothe and calm irritated skin and respiratory passages.
